data.body: ARCH DECISION (maintainer): standardize the output-flag on PYTHON, no duplicate bash/Python logic. Single source = src/rebar/_engine/ticket_output.py (parse_output(argv, profile) -> (fmt, rest); profiles: reader=default json/{json,llm}, ready=default text/{text,llm,json}, report=default text/{text,json}; canonical error text). Python entry points (ticket-ready.py, the show/list reducer invocations) import it. Pure-bash commands (validate/next-batch/bridge-status/list-epics) shell into 'python3 ticket_output.py resolve <profile> -- args' for the VALIDATED format; a single sourced shim ticket-output.sh does mechanical flag-stripping only (no allowed/validation/error logic in bash). macOS bash 3.2-safe (no mapfile).
